name: Garam Masala (Spice Mix - Mild)
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast coriander seeds separately for a few minutes until their rich aroma is given off.
2. Roast cumin seeds separately for a few minutes until their rich aroma is given off.
3. Roast fenugreek seeds separately for a few minutes until their rich aroma is given off.
4. Combine all roasted coriander, cumin, and fenugreek seeds with the remaining ingredients (clove, cardamon, mace, nutmeg, cinnamon, black pepper).
5. Grind the mixture into a fine powder.
6. Pass the mixture through a sieve to remove any lumps.
7. Store in an airtight jar.
NOTE: Roasting the ingredients separately is important since each gives off its characteristic aroma at a different time.
